(2) a TOKEN drop-guarantee system ('Tokens, if you use them it will guarantee... more drops late in chest / vault... and to refund'). (3) a DONOR SHOP + CUSTOM ITEMS ('Custom Items / donor shop for donaters'). (4) 'Changed Dungeons:' + 'Custom Dungeon; we will add more soon...' (the server adds/edits custom dungeons over time). (5) a 'market /level20 (for 2 week)' command/event + 'Nexus will change soon'. (6) owner admin spawn commands ('Spawning 10 Abyss Chest'). NEW bosses captured: Golem King (meme banter) + The Magical lord of sky (multi-part with Left/Right hands). Custom Oryx guardian taunts. Attacks are showcase-glimpses (edited promo, no bossends).
uncertain: It's an edited PROMO (quick cuts) -> boss ATTACKS not isolated (showcase only), map is a biome tour not a layout. SERVER IDENTITY: 'Elemental Realms' is INFERRED to be the ROTF target server via the VoltiPlay-owner link (strong, but the 'ROTF / Revenge of the Fallen' name vs 'Elemental Realms' brand relationship is not explicitly stated on-screen).
confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH for the server-FEATURE documentation (Token/donor/custom-dungeon/market systems — clear overlays) and the server-identity link (VoltiPlay owner -> Elemental Realms = the ROTF server). MEDIUM for the NEW boss candidates Golem King + The Magical lord of sky (clear taunts, but attacks/arenas are showcase-only). GENUINE owner content. Net value: clarifies the server brand ('Elemental Realms', distinct from 'Void Realm'), documents the custom Token/donor/dungeon systems, and adds 2 new boss candidates + custom Oryx guardian lines. Best follow-up: a non-promo run of Golem King / Magical lord of sky to capture attacks + complete arenas.
